N
Northwind Labs

Senior Frontend Engineer

Northwind Labs Remote Full-time $140k - $180k

About the role

Northwind Labs is building the next generation of data-intensive analytics tools used by thousands of teams worldwide. We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to own the architecture of our core dashboard product and mentor a growing frontend team.

What you'll do

  • Architect and build performant, accessible interfaces using React, TypeScript, and modern frontend tooling.
  • Own server-state management patterns and data-fetching strategy across a large, complex application.
  • Drive performance optimization work, including Core Web Vitals, code splitting, and virtualization for data-heavy views.
  • Design and maintain a shared component library and design system used across multiple product teams.
  • Mentor engineers, lead code reviews, and shape frontend architecture decisions.

What we're looking for

  • 7+ years of frontend engineering experience building production web applications.
  • Deep expertise in React and TypeScript, including modern patterns and hooks.
  • Strong experience with server-state libraries such as TanStack Query or similar.
  • Experience with micro-frontend or monorepo architectures (e.g. Nx).
  • Familiarity with end-to-end testing tools like Playwright or Cypress.
  • A track record of mentoring engineers and owning technical direction.

Nice to have

  • Experience with data visualization libraries (D3, Recharts, or similar).
  • Background in SaaS or enterprise-scale products.
  • Contributions to open-source frontend projects.

Benefits

  • Fully remote with flexible hours.
  • Competitive salary and equity.
  • Annual learning and conference budget.
